purpose: Eval fixtures for the planned screenshot-matching feature (LLM vision -> species[] -> /match). See docs/TEAM-SOURCES.md 'Screenshot matching'. Provided by the project owner 2026-07-06.
groundTruthNotes: expectedSpecies is authoritative only where the screenshot contains text naming the mons (the Japanese Champions team screens). Sprite-only screenshots carry unverified best-guess candidates ('?' = low confidence) — confirm during the first eval run and then promote to expectedSpecies.

fixtures.description: Cropped Showdown team preview header: format tag [gen9championsvgc2026regmb], player 'YOASOBI stan', 6 minisprites, no species text.
Pokemon Champions mobile team screen (ability/moves tab), Japanese. Species names in text; slot 4 is nicknamed 'Hai' (Garchomp by sprite/ability). Rich ground truth incl. items/abilities/moves.
Same team as champions-mobile-team-abilities-ja.png, stats tab (HP/Atk/... with EV-like allocations). Same expected species; nickname 'Hai' on the Garchomp slot.
Champions doubles ('だぶる') selection strip: 6 model renders with held-item icons, no species text.
Showdown battle team preview (animated battle sprites with gender + L50 tags), no species text.
Showdown battle side panel: trainer 'Siguii2' with 6 tiny minisprites (hardest case: ~30px sprites). Appears to be the same/similar team as showdown-battle-preview-models.png.

Cute starter-Pokemon illustration (Rowlet/Litten/Popplio/Sprigatito/Fuecoco/Quaxly with name tags). HARD negative: 6 valid, readable species names but NOT a team/battle screen — species-count validation alone would wrongly pass it. The model's layout classification must return recognized:false (artwork, not a competitive team).
Champions battle team preview, vertical layout (opponent 'ネギねこ', Standing By): 6 slots with model renders, type + gender icons only, some models partially obscured/shiny. Hardest Champions case.

negativeCasesTodo: One hard negative on file (Pokemon artwork with valid names). Still add 1-2 fully unrelated screenshots (non-Pokemon game, desktop) before the eval.
